audit_summary.summary_text: Static analysis of SKILL.md found a benign monorepo workspace utility. The documented Python code performs local workspace discovery by reading package manifests and uses a local git diff command to identify affected workspaces. No instruction overrides, hidden instructions, secret harvesting, credential access, external data exfiltration, remote script fetching, obfuscation, or reverse-shell behavior were identified. The described functionality is consistent with the stated skill purpose.
